title: ml.delete_trained_model

model_id.description: The unique identifier of the trained model.

force.description: Forcefully deletes a trained model that is referenced by ingest pipelines or has a started deployment.

timeout.description: Period to wait for a response. If no response is received before the timeout expires, the request fails and returns an error.

description:
Delete an unreferenced trained model.

The request deletes a trained inference model that is not referenced by an ingest pipeline.
